summary: Frontend testing complete: Hetzner Dark Theme and Reporting feature verified. All features working as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hetzner Dark Theme and Reporting feature are fully functional. All report templates load data correctly.

Login_Page_Hetzner_Theme.description: Login page displays Hetzner Dark Theme correctly
Login_Page_Hetzner_Theme.evidence: Body background: #141414, Card background: #262626, Red login button #d50c2d

Main_PIN_Pad_Hetzner_Theme.description: Main verification PIN-Pad matches Hetzner Dark Theme
Main_PIN_Pad_Hetzner_Theme.evidence: Dark background #141414, Red border on PIN card, Gray button backgrounds, TSRID logo at bottom

Reporting_Feature_Opens.description: Reporting feature opens from Admin Portal via document icon in header
Reporting_Feature_Opens.evidence: Found reporting button by title attribute, 'Reporting & Auswertungen' panel opens

Reporting_Devices_Table.evidence: 216 Einträge displayed, columns: Device ID, Status, Standort, Stadt, TeamViewer ID, SN PC

Reporting_Locations_Table.evidence: 214 Einträge displayed, columns: Standort-Code, Stationsname, Straße, PLZ, Stadt, Telefon

Reporting_TeamViewer_IDs_Table.description: TeamViewer IDs table shows data with IDs highlighted in red
Reporting_TeamViewer_IDs_Table.evidence: 216 Einträge displayed, TeamViewer IDs shown in red #d50c2d color

Reporting_Tenant_Selector.description: Tenant selector dropdown works with 3 options
Reporting_Tenant_Selector.evidence: Dropdown shows: Alle Tenants, Europcar, Puma

Reporting_Search_Filter.description: Search filter input is present and functional
Reporting_Search_Filter.evidence: Search input with 'Suchen...' placeholder available in toolbar

Reporting_Export_Buttons.description: Export buttons visible: PDF/Drucken, Excel, CSV
Reporting_Export_Buttons.evidence: All three export buttons visible in toolbar, enabled when data is loaded

navigation_path.reporting_access: Click document icon (FileText) button in Admin Portal header
